dialogues: Cadillacs® feature the Northstar System.
...as Jerry's dad towards the end of his life...
...as between business class and coach class.
Note Kramer's poster of the Jungfrau Railway...
...four-speed automatic transmission, and a premium V-engine.
...in their Ladies' Notions Shop was the hoop skirt in the 1860s.
...power steering, road-sensing suspension...
...but that's the last we heard about her.
The cast started filming the episode immediately following the read...
KRAMER ENTRANCE COUNTER: #322
koreanHints: 3. 그게 그녀에 대해 우리가 마지막으로 들은 소식이야.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- towards the end of : 막바지에, 끝 무렵에. 시간이나 기간의 후반부를 가리킬 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현
- as between A and B : A와 B 사이의 차이를 비유적으로 설명할 때 쓰는 표현. 비교 구문에서 자주 활용됨
- that's the last we heard about : 그것이 마지막으로 들은 소식이다. 소식이 끊겼거나 더 이상의 정보가 없을 때 쓰는 관용적 표현

dialogues: You're married, how would you feel
I got what you asked.
How long is this weekend, anyway?
Vincent. Where are you? I have to meet you.
I didn't know it was possible to come out of a coma.
You never really had the right comeback, anyway.
about the whole coma thing.
Maniacs are gonna get us all killed.
Yeah, yeah, I'm gonna let it go.
you're conscious, but with no muscular function.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- how would you feel : 상대방의 입장을 생각해보라고 할 때 쓰는 표현. "네가 그 입장이라면 어떻겠어?"라는 뉘앙스로 공감이나 반성을 유도할 때 자주 사용
- anyway (문장 끝) : 불평이나 의문을 강조할 때 문장 끝에 붙이는 표현. "도대체", "그나저나" 같은 뉘앙스를 더함
- let it go : 화나거나 신경 쓰이는 일을 더 이상 붙잡지 않고 놓아준다는 의미. "넘어가다", "잊어버리다"의 뉘앙스
